apple: A round fruit with red or green skin.
ant: A small insect that lives in colonies.
ball: A round object used in games.
book: A set of printed pages bound together.
cat: A small domesticated animal kept as a pet.
car: A road vehicle used for transportation.
door: A movable barrier used to open or close an entrance.
elephant: A very large land animal with a trunk.
fish: An animal that lives in water.
flower: The colorful part of a plant.
hand: The end part of the human arm.
insect: A small animal with six legs.
kite: A toy that flies in the wind.
king: A male ruler of a country.
lion: A large wild animal called king of the jungle.
monkey: An animal that lives in trees.
night: Time when the sun is not visible.
ocean: A very large body of salt water.
question: A sentence used to ask something.
river: A large natural stream of water.
sun: The star at the center of the solar system.
table: A piece of furniture with a flat top.
water: A clear liquid essential for life.
xylophone: A musical instrument with wooden bars.
yoga: A practice for physical and mental health.
zebra: An animal with black and white stripes.
zoo: A place where animals are kept.
